title: 1 Day Ujjain Temple Tour
travelStyle: Focused temple day with local travel

daysPlan.title: Mahakal and Sacred Ujjain
daysPlan.morning: Begin with Mahakal Darshan, then have a relaxed breakfast close to your stay.
daysPlan.afternoon: Rest during peak heat, followed by Harsiddhi Mata and the old-city temple area.
daysPlan.evening: Walk through Mahakal Lok and pause at Ram Ghat for the evening atmosphere.
daysPlan.food: Poha Jalebi breakfast and a simple vegetarian thali.
daysPlan.stay: Stay near Mahakal or Freeganj if arriving the previous night.
daysPlan.buffer: Keep 2–4 hours of flexible queue time for Mahakal.
daysPlan.familyTip: Do not add a long-distance side trip on the same day.

daysPlan.title: Ujjain Darshan Day
daysPlan.morning: Mahakal Darshan followed by breakfast and a short hotel rest.
daysPlan.afternoon: Visit Harsiddhi Mata and choose either Kal Bhairav or Sandipani Ashram.
daysPlan.evening: Mahakal Lok and Ram Ghat before an early night.
daysPlan.food: Poha Jalebi, Sabudana Khichdi and a light dinner.
daysPlan.stay: Ujjain, preferably near Mahakal or Freeganj.
daysPlan.buffer: Avoid committing to a fixed late-evening transfer.
daysPlan.familyTip: Limit the day to three major sacred stops.

daysPlan.title: Omkareshwar Jyotirlinga
daysPlan.morning: Start early for Omkareshwar and keep breakfast packed or planned en route.
daysPlan.afternoon: Jyotirlinga darshan and a gentle Narmada ghat experience.
daysPlan.evening: Return toward Indore or stay near Omkareshwar if the family is tired.
daysPlan.food: Freshly cooked vegetarian meal near the main pilgrim area.
daysPlan.stay: Indore for onward travel, or Omkareshwar for slower pacing.
daysPlan.buffer: Treat road timing as a placeholder and add festival traffic margin.
daysPlan.familyTip: An overnight stop is kinder for elderly parents.

title: 3 Days Ujjain + Indore + Maheshwar
bestFor: Families wanting spirituality, food and culture

daysPlan.title: Arrive and Settle into Ujjain
daysPlan.morning: Arrive via Indore and transfer to Ujjain without rushing.
daysPlan.evening: Mahakal Lok, Harsiddhi Mata and Ram Ghat.
daysPlan.food: Light Ujjain thali and local lassi.
daysPlan.buffer: Keep airport or train delay margin.
daysPlan.familyTip: Save the main darshan for a fresh morning.

daysPlan.title: Mahakal and Indore
daysPlan.afternoon: Transfer to Indore, check in and rest.
daysPlan.evening: Rajwada and a family-friendly food trail.
daysPlan.food: Poha Jalebi, Bhutte Ka Kees and selected Sarafa snacks.
daysPlan.buffer: Allow additional time for Ujjain–Indore traffic.
daysPlan.familyTip: Keep the evening food walk short for children and elders.

daysPlan.title: Maheshwar Narmada Day
daysPlan.morning: Drive to Maheshwar and visit Ahilya Fort.
daysPlan.afternoon: Lunch, weaving exploration and relaxed ghat time.
daysPlan.evening: Narmada sunset, then return to Indore.
daysPlan.food: Simple regional lunch and an early Indore dinner.
daysPlan.stay: Indore, or Maheshwar for slow travel.
daysPlan.buffer: Avoid a tight same-night flight after the road trip.
daysPlan.familyTip: Use assistance on steep ghat steps.

title: 5 Days Ujjain + Omkareshwar + Maheshwar + Mandu
bestFor: A complete Malwa and Narmada journey

daysPlan.title: Indore to Ujjain
daysPlan.morning: Arrive in Indore and transfer to Ujjain.
daysPlan.familyTip: Avoid main darshan immediately after a long journey.

daysPlan.title: Mahakal and Ujjain Circuit
daysPlan.afternoon: Rest, then Kal Bhairav and Sandipani Ashram.
daysPlan.buffer: Keep the afternoon flexible after darshan.
daysPlan.familyTip: Drop one temple if queues are tiring.

daysPlan.title: Omkareshwar to Maheshwar
daysPlan.afternoon: Darshan and onward travel to Maheshwar.
daysPlan.buffer: Road timings are placeholders; avoid rushing both sites.

daysPlan.title: Maheshwar to Mandu
daysPlan.afternoon: Transfer to Mandu and visit selected monuments.
daysPlan.evening: Return toward Indore before late night.
daysPlan.buffer: Choose two or three Mandu monuments, not the entire circuit.
daysPlan.familyTip: Carry sun protection and walking shoes.

daysPlan.title: Indore and Departure
daysPlan.afternoon: Shopping, hotel rest and departure preparation.
daysPlan.evening: Depart according to flight or train.
daysPlan.food: Indore breakfast and a comfortable family lunch.
daysPlan.buffer: Keep a large airport or station margin.
daysPlan.familyTip: Do not add a distant side trip before departure.

title: 7 Days MP Spiritual + Heritage Circuit
bestFor: Visitors wanting the complete central India story
travelStyle: One-way spiritual, heritage and nature circuit

daysPlan.title: Mahakal and Ujjain
daysPlan.afternoon: Rest, Kal Bhairav and Sandipani Ashram.
daysPlan.familyTip: Use a meeting point near crowded zones.

daysPlan.title: Maheshwar, Mandu and Indore
daysPlan.familyTip: Avoid excessive walking in afternoon heat.

daysPlan.title: Indore to Bhopal
daysPlan.buffer: Treat this as a transfer day.
daysPlan.familyTip: Choose a comfortable lake or central hotel.

daysPlan.title: Sanchi Heritage Day
daysPlan.afternoon: Stupa complex and museum, subject to current opening arrangements.
daysPlan.food: Packed water and a planned lunch.
daysPlan.buffer: Allow time for walking and sun breaks.

daysPlan.title: Bhimbetka and Departure
daysPlan.buffer: Do not book a tight flight connection.
daysPlan.familyTip: Uneven terrain may not suit every elderly visitor.
